summary: Implemented Issue #150 as a deterministic grouped learning curve evaluator for the Phase 4 diagnostic baseline. Clips from the same track.group_key are averaged into one independent group feature. The evaluator creates class-balanced, disjoint train and holdout partitions inside the train+val development pool, leaves the Phase 3 test split protected, records group-level metrics and class recall, and writes repeat-level curves, summaries, confusion data, manifest, and run log. The lightweight full-candidate run evaluated all 27 accepted v1 groups without additional simulation.
non_blocking_issues: The current pseudo v1 diagnostic baseline reaches a macro-F1 plateau at four training groups per class, but this does not establish a general run-count requirement.

The protected test split has only one group per class and was not used by the learning curve. Issue #129 must decide whether to adopt k=4 as an MVP lower bound or generate additional protected evaluation runs.
Real-video track-count requirements remain separate because no real-video labels or domain-generalization evaluation were used.

tests_reviewed.command: uv run pytest -q tests/test_phase4_learning_curve.py tests/test_phase4_baseline_classifier.py tests/test_phase4_clip_dataset_loader.py

tests_reviewed.result: PASS (reused the Phase 4 baseline freeze validator, exposed the v1 freeze in grouped learning curve config, and added a v2 rejection regression test)

tests_reviewed.command: uv run python scripts/03_phase3/build_clip_dataset.py config=conf/phase3/gt_passthrough_v1.yaml input_dataset=outputs/phase2_analysis/flagella_count_behavior/datasets/v1 output_dir=outputs/2026-07-24/143640/phase3_gt_passthrough_v1_full_candidates filters.max_per_class=null clip.duration_s=0.5 clip.window_policy=non_overlap

adr_reason: This evaluator follows the accepted group_key split policy and existing diagnostic baseline. It adds no dependency, does not change the physical model or dataset schema, and does not make the final independent-run-count adoption decision.
next_actions: Review and merge Issue #150, then connect the machine-readable dataset freeze gate to Issue #128.
Decide in Issue #129 whether k=4 is accepted as the pseudo-v1 MVP training lower bound or whether additional protected evaluation groups are required.
Keep RUN-TUMBLE dataset v2 deferred in Issue #145 with Project Status TODO.
